publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Files relating to her career, to her teaching at Elmira College, and to a sexual discrimination lawsuit.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Lee Kass papers, #6520. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Files relating to her graduate studies at Cornell, to her teaching at Elmira College, to her research in the Bahamas, to her work as a Visiting Professor at Cornell, and to a sexual discrimination lawsuit.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 11, 16, 17, and 18, litigation files, are restricted during the lifetime of Lee Kass or with her permission.

did.unittitle: Not all the material in the collection is covered by this guide.
Backgrounds and frontiers in modern biological science
Basic Biological Concepts Lecture and Labs
Basic Biological Concepts Labs and Activities
Workshop at Grace Episcopal Church, Elmira, NY
CORE 2000 (Medieval and Renaissance) and slides plus note for Alchemy Lecture
Fulbright Scholar, College of the Bahamas
Correspondence with research collaborator Beverly Rathcke, University of Michigan
Women's Rights Park Opening, program and LBK photos
Josef Stein Award to LBK, photos
Satter and Andrews, LLP Letter to Gale
Interrogatories of Gale and Kass EEOC
Division Chair Memos on Salary-Merit and Stalting
Division Char Memos on Salary, Merit and Stalting
Response to Interrogation of DI Gale
EC Answer and Final Complaint EEOC
Deposition Questions and Ducuments. Gale Letter.
I #6 Right to Sue Documents in hue EEOC
EOC Depositions: DHR, Witness Hist., Schedule.
Jerry Gapp, Reddick Memo sent on advice of R. Brown
Correspondence and Reviews of Major. Soc. Science CRJ
Davis and Heywood, Field, Herbarium, and Library Chapter 8

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Date of original publication; this is a photocopy

did.unittitle: Jeffrey, Intro to Pl. Tax Chapters 1-3
Term III Close, Knowing and Growing Plants
Querying Farm Project, Term IV 1985 Independent Study

"T.F. Lucy The Man and The Myth" Carol Long

Correspondence From Carol Re. T.F. Lucy
Kelloff/Kass T.F. Lucy Notebook from Front Pocket

Ann Koenig Directed Study Term I
Joanne Kosty Independent Study Term I
George Steenrod Directed Study Term III
NY Natural History Conference Kass and Kelloff
T.F. Lucy's Uppersusq. Flora Herb Rediscovered
Final Draft of Lucy Paper for Rhodora

Lucy Presentation NY Natural History Conference
Jamie Masclee Research in Botany Term III
Steve Young NY Nat Heritage Program
Transfer of Buf Lucy to B.H. Herbarium
McClintock biography and Companion Volume materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Box 43 contains notes and documents from research for McClintock biopgrahy, inlcuding reprints, archive notes, and other publications by Kass.
Box 44 contains McClintock reprints and photocopies, Kass' notes for Companion Volume and biopgrahy
Box 45 contains correspondence, drafts, and scans for Companion Volume as well as rejected book proposals. See note in box from April 30, 2025.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Box 47 contains photo slides, floppy disks, zip dicks, and CDs of teaching files and McClintock research files. Boxes also includes some notes and correspondence.
Box 48 contains photographs and CDs from Cornell University Plant Breeding Department, centennial materials, and other relevant CDs for plant breeding at Cornell.
Box 49 contains tape recordings of Kass interviews for McClintock biography and CDs of some interviews. Also includes some foldered materials.
